title: Keralis Create Pack
description: Collection of mods used in Keralis Create YouTube Series.
body:
The official collection of mods used in the [Keralis](https://www.youtube.com/Keralis) Minecraft Create Mod YouTube series!

This pack focuses on creativity, atmosphere, and automation, bringing together everything you need to build beautiful worlds and complex contraptions.

Featuring the Create Mod at its heart, along with carefully selected mods for building, exploration, and immersion, this pack lets you design cozy towns, scenic landscapes, and fully functional factories.

**_Disclaimer: Some recipe conflicts might exist._**

**Recommended Resource Pack**: https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations

**Recommended Shaders**: https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined or https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-unbound



![One of the views from the world.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bbcb2f8a15c2a1fb67a0327e75d8e2c89d73dc2d.jpeg)
